entities.description: High-throughput and cost-effective technologies used to facilitate pangenome studies

entities.name: SINGLE-REFERENCE GENOMES
entities.description: Traditional genomic representations based on a single reference sequence

entities.name: PANGENOMES
entities.description: Genomic representations that combine data from multiple accessions to capture the full genetic variation of a species

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in DNA sequences present within a species

entities.name: STRUCTURAL VARIATIONS
entities.description: Complex DNA polymorphisms that are major determinants of genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that are of interest for agricultural improvement

entities.name: NONCODING REGULATORY SEQUENCES
entities.description: DNA sequences that do not code for proteins but regulate gene expression

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments used to analyze RNA transcripts for pangenome annotation

entities.name: EPIGENOMIC EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments used to analyze epigenetic modifications for pangenome annotation

entities.name: PANGENOME GRAPHS
entities.description: Innovative data structures used to represent the complete content of plant pangenomes
